buildCommand: cd ../.. && NEXT_DIST_IN_MONOREPO_ROOT= NEXT_BUILD_OUTPUT_AT_MONOREPO_ROOT= pnpm --filter propertytoolsai run build

crons.comment: SEO – refresh stale pages (168 h+, up to 200). Runs nightly.
SEO – auto-queue + generate new topic×location cluster pages (batch 75).
SEO – optimise high-traffic pages with low lead conversion.
SEO – weekly OpenAI content quality pass (requires SEO_OPT_WEEKLY_LIMIT env).
SEO – generate new cluster pages for missing topic×location pairs (programmable SEO / SERP domination).
SEO – keyword discovery from seed list; expand keyword DB (requires KEYWORD_DISCOVERY_SEEDS env).
Leads – daily lead scoring refresh for all active leads.
Leads – process queued follow-up jobs (email + SMS). Runs hourly.
Emails – send queued outbound emails and SMS. Runs hourly.
Tasks – move deferred tasks to active when their due date arrives.
Smart Match – send daily property-match digest emails to subscribers.
Smart Automation – trigger rule-based follow-ups (report_view, high_engagement, inactivity).
Valuation – auto-calibrate AVM model weights from recent sold data.
City data – refresh local market stats (median price, inventory, DOM).
LeadSmart sync – refresh lead batch from LeadSmart service.
Valuation – learning loop for lead pricing model.
